name: Wandering Ghost of the Castle of Dreams
desc: 1 "Castle of Dreams" monster. If a Field Spell you control would leave the field by card effects, you can banish this card (from your field or GY), instead. If this card is in your banishment, while you control a Field Spell: You can Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Wandering Ghost of the Castle of Dreams" once per turn.
strings: Special Summon this card from banishment
